description: A user reports they cannot access a feature they believe they should have access to.

nodes.task_description: Identify the user and their assigned user role within the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the user has a 'Standard User' role.

nodes.task_description: Check the permission settings for the 'Standard User' role.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that the feature the user wants to access is restricted to the 'Admin User' role.

nodes.task_description: Explain to the user that they need to contact their account administrator to request a role change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly explains the permission structure and directs the user to the appropriate internal contact.
